canonical_name: a maiden clothed in shimmering white
she who gives life and death
all those in that great hall
Palomides, Cai... all the old Companions
all of those who had ever been among them
all the others in the hall
all the others in the hall eating and drinking
priests of a narrow God who would deny all other truths
the Companions of the Round Table
the lower end of the hall
that great harlot who has from the beginning of time been the enemy of God
a woman to bear his son
the very house of the Goddess
every garden she had ever entered in all her life
the small, once-prisoned thing within her
so many of my Companions scattered to the four corners of the world
this land whereof God has given me the stewardship
the two greatest men within the borders of this world
